document.title: Domain Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold to LAWIM_V2
document.description: Complete enriched catalog of all 175 Heritage Gold domain extensions for LAWIM_V2 implementation

extensions.current_limitation: No trust or verification level exists in V2 User model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add trust_level INT (1-6) field to User model
extensions.data_migration_requirement: Set default trust_level=1 for existing users

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has phoneE164 field but no verification flag or OTP flow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add phone_verified Boolean to User; implement OTP verification flow

extensions.current_limitation: No identity verification concept exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add identity_verified Boolean; implement document upload + admin validation workflow

extensions.source_concept: Niveau 4 — Documents pro validés (Professional Docs Validated)
extensions.current_limitation: No professional document verification workflow in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add professional_docs_verified Boolean; implement pro document workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No professional verification concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add professional_verified Boolean; complete verification workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No reference account concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add reference_account Boolean; admin-only grant mechanism

extensions.current_limitation: No badge display system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement badge rendering system; derive from phone_verified flag

extensions.current_limitation: No email_verified flag or email badge in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add email_verified flag; implement badge display

extensions.current_limitation: No identity verification badge in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Derive from identity_verified trust level; implement badge display

extensions.current_limitation: No owner verification concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add owner_verified field; implement document verification for owners

extensions.current_limitation: No agency verification field on Organization model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agency_verified to Organization model; implement verification workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No partner badge system in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Derive from professional_verified; add partner-specific badge

extensions.current_limitation: No professional badge in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Derive from professional_verified trust level

extensions.current_limitation: No agent active status tracking in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add is_active_agent field or derive from onboarding completion

extensions.current_limitation: No structured agent onboarding workflow exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement onboarding state machine with onboarding_status field on User

extensions.source_concept: Minimum 3 active agents for operational agency
extensions.current_limitation: No minimum agent constraint enforcement in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agent count validation rule; implement agency operational status logic

extensions.current_limitation: No lead routing mechanism exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement agent_zones table (agent_id, zone); build lead routing engine

extensions.current_limitation: No lead costing system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement lead costing module with configurable price per lead

extensions.current_limitation: No agent credit system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement agent_credits (credits, total_spent, last_recharge) and boost_purchases (boost_type, price, expires_at) models

extensions.current_limitation: No agent rating system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agent_rating FLOAT field; implement post-interaction rating workflow

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has Organization model but no agency-specific role on User within organization
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agency_role enum field (responsible, admin, agent, assistant) to User or Organization membership model

extensions.source_concept: Agency components with trust and validation
extensions.current_limitation: V2 Organization has users+properties but no agency-level trust, validations, or admin role
extensions.proposed_structure: Add trust_level, verification fields to Organization model

extensions.source_concept: Agency registration fields (RCCM, CNI, tax ID)
extensions.current_limitation: V2 Organization model missing required registration fields
extensions.proposed_structure: Add rccm, tax_id, cni_document fields to Organization model

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model has no boost_level or boost_expires_at fields
extensions.proposed_structure: Add boost_level and boost_expires_at to Property model; implement boost purchase flow

extensions.current_limitation: Same as boost_7j — no boost system exists
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as same boost system with duration parameter (7 vs 30 days)

extensions.current_limitation: No premium listing concept in V2 Property model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add is_premium field to Property; implement premium ranking boost in matching engine

extensions.current_limitation: No subscription model exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Subscription model linked to Organization/User with billing via Campay

extensions.current_limitation: No visit accompaniment service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='visit_accompaniment' linked to Conversation

extensions.current_limitation: No transaction accompaniment service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='transaction_accompaniment' with fulfillment tracking

extensions.current_limitation: No document verification service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Defer to later phase; requires document upload and verification workflow

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media model supports photo storage but not professional photography service ordering
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with service order origin tracking

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media model supports video but no professional video production service
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with service order origin for video services

extensions.current_limitation: No property verification_status field in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add verification_status and verified_at to Property; implement verification as ServiceOrder

extensions.current_limitation: No pay-per-connection mechanism exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement LeadPurchase model + agent credit system. This is the single most important monetization mechanism.

extensions.current_limitation: No premium assistant service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Requires human decision on distinction from accompagnement services before implementing

extensions.current_limitation: Distinct from boost (2,000/5,000) and premium_listing (10,000) — unclear differentiation
extensions.proposed_structure: Requires human decision to determine distinct semantics vs boost/premium_listing

extensions.current_limitation: No valuation service or matrix in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement estimation service matrix with valuation workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No expertise service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement expertise service with inspection workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No document verification service matrix in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Linked to controle_documentaire monetized service; implement verification workflow

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Conversation model links user-property but has no visit scheduling or accompaniment tracking
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement visit scheduling as a service with state machine

extensions.current_limitation: No visit follow-up tracking in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend visit infrastructure with contre-visite type

extensions.current_limitation: No rental management service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement rental management workflow with recurring service model

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement listing as a service with order tracking

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
extensions.proposed_structure: Same as mise_en_location but for sale transaction

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property has publishedAt but no publication workflow as a service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement publication service with channel management

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media stores photos but has no service ordering for photography
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with photography service order flow

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media supports video but no video service ordering
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media with video service order flow

extensions.current_limitation: No drone service capability in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as sub-service of photography

extensions.current_limitation: No staging service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service with staging workflow

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Project.projectType can represent renovation generically but no dedicated service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement renovation service with scope management

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Project.projectType can represent construction generically but no dedicated service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement construction service with project management

extensions.current_limitation: No maintenance service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as recurring service

extensions.current_limitation: No cleaning service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service

extensions.current_limitation: No security service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service

extensions.current_limitation: No moving service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service

extensions.current_limitation: No insurance service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner referral service

extensions.current_limitation: No legal advice service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner professional service with lawyer network

extensions.current_limitation: No tax advice service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner professional service

extensions.current_limitation: No condo management service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional management service

extensions.current_limitation: No rent recovery service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as dispute resolution service

extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'carpenter' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: No lead purchase system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement LeadPurchase model with lead_bronze pack

extensions.current_limitation: No lead pack system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement lead_silver pack with tiered pricing

extensions.current_limitation: No lead pack system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement lead_gold pack with tiered pricing

extensions.current_limitation: No contact unlock mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement coordinate unlock as distinct purchase type

extensions.current_limitation: No premium profile concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement premium seeker profile with priority features

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2 (feature_flag OFF)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement diaspora service with verified property access

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement diaspora rapport tier with report delivery

extensions.current_limitation: No diaspora service exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement diaspora complet tier with full accompaniment

extensions.current_limitation: No subscription system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agent_business subscription tier to Subscription model

extensions.current_limitation: No service order or service lifecycle exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement ServiceOrder model with 8-state lifecycle

extensions.current_limitation: No payment processing system active in V2 (feature flag payments=OFF)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Payment model with 10-state sub-machine; integrate Campay

extensions.current_limitation: No matching engine or state machine exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Match entity with 10-state lifecycle; build scoring engine

extensions.source_concept: Mise en Relation / Contact Lifecycle (6 states)
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has conversation model but no contact workflow, no double consent, no holder decision tracking
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Contact entity with 6-state lifecycle; enforce double consent; add holder silence escalation

extensions.current_limitation: No Visit entity or state machine in V2 (project step:visit is label only)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Visit model with 9-state lifecycle; add scheduling, confirmation, no-show tracking, post-visit NBA

extensions.current_limitation: No Transaction entity or state machine in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Transaction model with 10-state lifecycle; add document requirements per type; integrate payment

extensions.current_limitation: No payment or service system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement ServiceOrder and Payment models with full lifecycle; integrate Campay payment processor

extensions.current_limitation: No incident management system in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Incident model with 8-state lifecycle; add 12 incident types; 4 priority levels

extensions.current_limitation: No mediation system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Mediation model with 8-state lifecycle; define mediator role and boundaries

extensions.current_limitation: No CRM pipeline exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Lead model with 8-stage pipeline; scoring engine; classification; routing

extensions.current_limitation: No SIE publication pipeline exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Publication model with 11-state lifecycle; SIE integration; campaign tracking

extensions.current_limitation: No redirection/click tracking pipeline in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Redirection model with 12-state lifecycle; bot/dedup detection; analytics

extensions.current_limitation: No conversion attribution pipeline in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Conversion model with 12-state lifecycle; last-touch attribution

extensions.current_limitation: No agent invitation/onboarding workflow in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement AgentInvitation model with 7-state lifecycle; secure link generation; document validation

extensions.current_limitation: No identity resolution exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement IdentityResolution model with 5-state lifecycle; signal matching; human review

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no orchestrator; workflows are distributed across project, property, conversation models
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement orchestrator workflow engine that delegates to sub-workflows

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no family concept — propertyType is free-form string
extensions.proposed_structure: Add property_family enum to schema.prisma with 7 values; validate in property_domain.py

extensions.source_concept: Property type hierarchy (11 basic + 41 matrix types)
extensions.current_limitation: V2 propertyType is free-form string with no validation or hierarchy
extensions.proposed_structure: Create PROPERTY_TYPES enum set; store subtype in metadata_json; add type-to-family validation

extensions.current_limitation: No qualification matrix system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Link property types to qualification matrix catalog; implement matrix selection by type

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has 5 statuses (draft, open, closed, published, archived) — no enrichment or commercial pipeline
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend property state machine from 5 to 10+ states covering enrichment and commercial pipeline

extensions.current_limitation: V2 can_publish() checks only 3 of 8 rules (title, city, price)
extensions.proposed_structure: Expand can_publish() from 3 to 8 rules including family validation, type coherence, détenteur check, normalization, document presence

extensions.current_limitation: V2 only has price_min/price_max range
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend price model: add price_displayed, negotiable flag, price_negotiable, price_final, price_estimation, price_history to metadata_json

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no distinction between sale price, rent, deposit, fees, or taxes
extensions.proposed_structure: Add price type classification field; store typed prices in metadata_json

extensions.current_limitation: No data quality scoring system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement quality scoring engine with completeness and reliability dimensions; grade properties A+ through D

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has 3 generic fields (surface, bedrooms, bathrooms) for all property types
extensions.proposed_structure: Add per-type field schemas in metadata_json with validation per property family

extensions.current_limitation: V2 availability is a free string (available, reserved, sold, rented, unavailable) with no transition enforcement
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement availability state machine with valid transition rules per Gold specification

extensions.current_limitation: No auto-archive mechanism exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement cron job for 90-day inactivity auto-archive

extensions.current_limitation: Not represented in V2 property model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add investment-specific fields and workflows to property model

extensions.current_limitation: Agricultural property concept does not exist in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add agricultural family to property_family enum; implement sub-referentiel

extensions.current_limitation: Hotel is treated as commercial type or not represented in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add hotel family to property_family enum; map commercial.hotel to this family

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has separate Project model; not linked as property family
extensions.proposed_structure: Add project family to property_family enum; link Property to Project for development properties

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no intent detection — users explicitly select project_type from form
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement intent classifier KLASS with keyword dictionaries for FR, EN, PID languages

extensions.current_limitation: No confidence scoring or threshold concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement configurable confidence threshold with fallback mechanism

extensions.current_limitation: V2 supports single project_type per user; no parallel intent handling
extensions.proposed_structure: Allow parallel project creation from multi-intent detection results

extensions.current_limitation: No urgency detection mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add urgency scoring to intent detection pipeline; store urgency level on Project

extensions.current_limitation: No structured entity extraction in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement per-intent entity extraction for qualification auto-population

extensions.current_limitation: No formal role mapping or user role abstraction exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Intent model with role mapping layer; assign user role based on detected intent

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by 'rent' project_type; no dedicated short_stay handling
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'short_stay' to PROJECT_TYPES or implement as sub-type with metadata

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by 'rent' with timeline_horizon maxing at 2 years
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'lease' to PROJECT_TYPES; extend timeline_horizon to support 3+ years

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'commercial_lease_transfer' as project type or sub-type

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by generic 'rent' with no commercial lease handling
extensions.proposed_structure: Add commercial lease handling to 'lease' type or create dedicated sub-type

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'business_transfer' as project type

extensions.current_limitation: Implicitly bundled into buy/invest projects; no standalone financing request type
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'finance' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement 10 financing qualification matrices

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'find' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement professional search workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'service' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement service procurement workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No qualification matrix system exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 18 residential qualification matrices with field definitions and priority

extensions.current_limitation: No land qualification matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 7 land qualification matrices with title status fields

extensions.current_limitation: No commercial qualification matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 21 commercial qualification matrices

extensions.current_limitation: No investment qualification matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 5 investment qualification matrices

extensions.current_limitation: No financing qualification matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 10 financing request matrices

extensions.current_limitation: No professional search matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 27 professional search matrices

extensions.source_concept: Real Estate Service qualification matrices (24 matrices)
extensions.current_limitation: No real estate service matrices in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 24 real estate service matrices

extensions.current_limitation: No field-to-role mapping exists in V2 qualification
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement field dictionary with role assignments per qualification matrix field

extensions.current_limitation: No question priority weighting in V2 qualification
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement priority levels for qualification fields (mandatory, important, optional)

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has flat journey steps with no progressive disclosure order
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement ordered qualification wizard with 10-step progressive disclosure

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has single qualification flow regardless of channel
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement channel-adaptive qualification with configurable question limits per channel

extensions.current_limitation: No lead scoring exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement scoring engine with base scores, boosters, and penalties

extensions.current_limitation: No score boosting mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 13+ configurable score boosters with weights

extensions.current_limitation: No score penalty mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 8+ configurable score penalties with weights

extensions.current_limitation: No lead classification in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement classification thresholds and class assignment logic

extensions.current_limitation: No lead routing mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement routing engine with configurable rules (score-based, zone-based, round-robin)

extensions.current_limitation: No multi-factor scoring in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 7-factor scoring model with configurable factor weights

extensions.current_limitation: No behavior tracking infrastructure in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Add behavior tracking fields to Lead/User model; implement data collection points

extensions.current_limitation: No fraud detection in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 4 fraud detection layers with configurable rules and temporary suspension actions

extensions.current_limitation: No agent rating mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement post-interaction rating workflow and agent_rating calculation

extensions.current_limitation: No feedback handling in V2 (Notification model exists but no feedback loop)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement feedback collection, aggregation, and reporting module

extensions.current_limitation: No lead SLA concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement SLA tracking per lead with priority-based thresholds and breach escalation

extensions.current_limitation: No matching engine exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Match entity and matching algorithm with trigger events

extensions.current_limitation: No scoring dimensions exist in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 5 scoring dimensions with configurable weights per property type

extensions.current_limitation: No geographic scoring in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement geographic scoring with distance tiers and zone-based matching

extensions.current_limitation: No compatibility level classification in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement compatibility level thresholds and display logic

extensions.current_limitation: No rematching concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement rematching triggers and rules; add rematching_count to dossier

extensions.current_limitation: No exclusion logic in V2 matching
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement exclusion rule engine with configurable criteria

extensions.current_limitation: No transaction success prediction in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement transaction success score based on historical patterns and match quality

extensions.current_limitation: No market intelligence in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement market tension index calculation by property type, location, price range

extensions.current_limitation: No dossier health scoring in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement dossier health score based on qualification completeness and data quality

extensions.current_limitation: No property health scoring in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement property health score based on data quality, completeness, freshness

extensions.current_limitation: No matching role concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Define 9 matching roles with role-specific scoring weights and permissions

extensions.current_limitation: No search expansion logic in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement progressive search expansion rules (expand location, budget range, property type)

extensions.current_limitation: No market surveillance mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement event-driven matching triggers on new property publication and availability changes

extensions.current_limitation: No SLA concept exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement SLA registry with configurable thresholds per property type per state

extensions.current_limitation: No state-level SLA enforcement in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement per-state SLA thresholds with configurable duration per entity type

extensions.current_limitation: No lead SLA concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement SLA by lead priority with breach detection and escalation

extensions.current_limitation: No SLA monitoring infrastructure in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement SLA breach detection service with configurable check intervals

extensions.current_limitation: No SLA escalation mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 3-tier escalation workflow with configurable actions per tier

extensions.current_limitation: No holder response tracking or silence escalation in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement holder silence tracking with configurable reminder intervals and escalation actions

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has derive_next_actions() for pending steps only — not per-state NBA
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement NBA registry with state-specific action definitions per workflow

extensions.current_limitation: No NBA priority system in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement 9-level NBA priority with action-specific priority assignment

extensions.current_limitation: No follow-up calendar in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement follow-up scheduling with J1, J7, J30, J90 intervals and automatic reminders

extensions.current_limitation: No NBA-SLA integration in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement NBA recalculation trigger on SLA breach events

extensions.current_limitation: No explicit approval level or workflow exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement ApprovalWorkflow model with approver_role, target_type, target_id, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at

extensions.current_limitation: V2 read access is implicit per role; no explicit permission check
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement explicit Read permission check system if fine-grained RBAC needed

extensions.current_limitation: V2 creation rights are role-dependent but not formally modeled
extensions.proposed_structure: Formalize Create permission level per role in permission matrix

extensions.current_limitation: V2 edit access granted by ownership or organization; no formal items-under-responsibility concept
extensions.proposed_structure: Formalize Edit permission scope with three tiers: own, managed, all
